name: Gunstock Ranch
tagline: Horseback rides through the Koolau foothills with mountain and ocean views — pony rides for the little ones.
parking: Free parking on-site at the ranch
hours: Mon–Sat 9am–4pm. Closed Sundays. Rides by reservation only
bestTime: Morning rides for cooler weather and better mountain views before clouds build
kamaaina: Kamaaina rates available — mention when booking
talkStory: This 750-acre working cattle ranch has been in operation since the 1960s, nestled against the Koolau Mountains in Laie. Originally part of the old sugar plantation lands, the ranch still runs cattle alongside its trail ride operation. Their horses are Hawaiian-bred and famously calm, trained using natural horsemanship methods. The sunset ride, which most families overlook, follows a ridgeline trail with panoramic views from Laie Point to Kahuku and is only offered seasonally.
